papers.title: DiffusionDrive-2: Scalable Diffusion Models for Long-Horizon Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: DiffusionDrive-2 extends diffusion models to handle long-horizon autonomous driving tasks with improved scalability and sample efficiency.

papers.title: BEV-Transformer++: Unified BEV Representation for Multi-Task Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: BEV-Transformer++ proposes a unified BEV representation that simultaneously handles perception, prediction, and planning tasks in autonomous driving.

papers.title: VLA-Driver: Vision-Language-Action Framework for Interpretable Driving Decisions
papers.summary: VLA-Driver uses vision-language-action framework to make interpretable driving decisions with natural language explanations.

papers.title: Occupancy-World: Occupancy Prediction for Dynamic Scene Understanding
papers.summary: Occupancy-World improves occupancy prediction for dynamic scene understanding in autonomous driving scenarios.

papers.title: WorldModel-VLA: Integrating World Models with Vision-Language-Action for Interpretable Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: WorldModel-VLA combines world modeling with vision-language-action frameworks to create interpretable end-to-end autonomous driving systems that can explain their decisions through natural language.
